caption: A man dressed in a blue traditional martial arts outfit performs a demonstration with a long staff in a large, well-lit banquet hall. He is positioned on a dark blue floor mat in front of an audience of people seated at round tables. In the initial sequence, he stands in a wide stance, holding the staff horizontally across his body. He then transitions into a dynamic movement, lifting his leg high and swinging the staff upward. As he continues the sequence, he maintains the high leg position while rotating his torso and bringing the staff down in a controlled arc. The audience, wearing a mix of casual and formal attire, watches the performance from the background. The room features high ceilings, neutral-toned walls with recessed lighting, and several red exit signs visible above the doorways.
